case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. KRISTEN DRAKE et al

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO MTN TO QUASH SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL D. KAHN IN SUPP OF OPPOSITION TO MTN TO QUASH FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DRAKE, KRISTEN

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT KRISTEN DRAKE MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS. CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 14, 2012 TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. NO LATER THAN MAY 7 PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Set For Trial On Jul-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar May-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kristen Drake, Tel. 415.608.8702, Defendant and moving party appearing on her own behalf.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KRISTEN DRAKE'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is Granted. The weight of the evidence shows that Ms. Drake was not personally served. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Continued To May-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT KRISTEN DRAKE Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Continued on the court's own motion to May 14, 2012 to provide plaintiff an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. No later than May 7 plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
